title: Warning Signs For The AI Boom, Anthropic Passes OpenAI, Robinhood’s AI Trading
summary: Alex Kantrowitz and Ranjan Roy discuss warning signs in the AI boom, including excessive token consumption, low shipping rates on token spending, and circular financing issues in AI investment. They also cover Anthropic's valuation milestone, AI-powered trading applications, and privacy concerns around integrating AI services with personal data.
